FlipRun.CardDesc.Ledger: Ledger: base +2 score; turn end grants bonus score equal to 25% of turn coins.

FlipRun.CardDesc.Mirror: Mirror: copies 70% of the previous card gain for both coins and score.
FlipRun.Log.TurnReveal: Turn {0}: you may flip {1} cards from a {2}x{3} board.
FlipRun.CardDesc.Firework: Firework: +1 coin, +4 score; +6 more score if it is the last flip this turn.
FlipRun.CardDesc.GoldBlock: Gold Block: +7 coins, +3 score; combos grant even more coins.
FlipRun.Msg.Rabbit.Content: You flipped Rabbit. Gain +{0} bonus score this time.
FlipRun.Action.Reward: Action: Choose 1 of the 3 reward cards below and add it to the deck.
FlipRun.CardDesc.PiggyBank: Piggy Bank: base +1 score; turn end grants bonus coins equal to 15% of turn coins.
FlipRun.CardDesc.Dice: Dice: randomly grants 1-5 coins and 1-6 score.
FlipRun.CardDesc.Clover: Clover: +2 score and grants +1 extra flip next turn (+2 on combo).
FlipRun.CardDesc.Carrot: Carrot: +1 coin, +4 score; +6 more score if Rabbit appeared this turn.
FlipRun.CardDesc.Crown: Crown: +7 score; +3 more if you already own a relic, +2 more if Gold Block appeared this turn.
FlipRun.Msg.GoldBlock.Content: You flipped Gold Block. Big coin gain this time: +{0} coins.
FlipRun.CardDesc.Rabbit: Rabbit: +3 score; each extra Rabbit this turn adds +4 more score.
FlipRun.CardDesc.Magnet: Magnet: +2 coins, +2 score; +2 more coins for each economy card already flipped this turn.
FlipRun.CardDesc.ChainBadge: Chain Badge: +2 score and increases same-card combo multiplier.
FlipRun.CardDesc.CopperCoin: Copper Coin: +2 coins, +1 score; same-card combos grant extra coins.
FlipRun.Log.Magnet: Magnet triggered: +{0} bonus coins from economy synergy.
FlipRun.CardDesc.Ticket: Ticket: +1 coin, +6 score; +5 more score if Gold Block appeared this turn.
FlipRun.CardDesc.SilverCoin: Silver Coin: +4 coins, +2 score; +2 more score if an economy card already appeared this turn.
FlipRun.Log.ShopBuyCardSimple: Shop bought one random card for {0} coins.
FlipRun.Log.RunStart: Run starts. Flip facedown cards and choose 1 reward card after each turn.
FlipRun.Log.Firework: Firework finale: +{0} bonus score on the last flip.
FlipRun.Deck.Title: Current Deck
FlipRun.CardDesc.Mine: Mine: +1 coin on flip, then stays for 2 turns; gains +2 coins at the start of each turn.
FlipRun.Log.PersistentTickStart: {0} triggered at turn start: +{1} coins, +{2} score.
FlipRun.Log.PersistentArm: {0} unfolds and will stay for {1} turns.
FlipRun.CardDesc.Fountain: Fountain: +2 score on flip, then stays for 2 turns; gains +4 score at the end of each turn.
FlipRun.Action.Battle: Action: Click a facedown card to flip it. Persistent cards already on board trigger automatically.
FlipRun.CardDesc.Market: Market: +1 coin and +1 score on flip, then stays for 3 turns; +1 coin at turn start and +2 score at turn end.
FlipRun.Log.PersistentTickEnd: {0} triggered at turn end: +{1} coins, +{2} score.
